description: Review of compactness and some consequences. Quantifier elimination with examples. The omitting types theorem. Categoricity. Baldwin-Lachlan theory. Strongly minimal and o-minimal theories. Saturated models. Morley's theorem. Familiarity with the topics in a basic Foundations course such asMATH 770is strongly recommended.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Graduate/professional standing or member of the Pre-Masters Mathematics (Visiting International) Program
